reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Baños extremadamente limpios,playeros atentos,lugares amplios de descanso y servicios varios.
Solo observo la indiferencia de un empleado Angel, que se negó a facilitarnos poner al frío, una inyeccion oncologica de mi esposa,que por tener que quedarnos a pecnoctar en el lugar.
Angel, ojalá nunca te nieguen algo que necesites,así aprendes una lección.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Extremely clean restrooms, attentive staff, spacious rest areas, and various services.
My only complaint is the indifference of one employee, Angel, who refused to let us put my wife's cancer injection in the refrigerator, even though we had to stay overnight.
Angel, I hope you're never denied anything you need; that's how you learn a lesson.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGdFZXdzVRME0zVVhodFJrZHVORVJXUjB4MWFrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Califico con la máxima excelencia porque ayer, domingo 18/01/26 Yanina del Full, y sus compañeros, incluyendo los de hoy a la mañana, colaboraron con algo relacionado a mi salud.
Exceptuo a ANGEL, grosero insensible!!!!
Ayer domingo a las 18:50 cuando arribamos con mi esposo le contamos que yo era paciente oncológica, que no me sentía bien y los playeros nos autorizaron a pasar la noche en el  recreo y reponerme descansando en nuestra casilla rodante para seguir viaje hoy temprano, que necesitaba me conserven en frío una inyección fundamental y carísima por mi dolencia.
Que nos dijo: que NO. Que eso sólo podía autorizarlo un supervisor y que lamentablemente, terminaba de irse. Le reiteré lo delicado de la situación, sumé que soy socia del ACA hace añares, le pregunté si no podía consultar por teléfono a quien corresponda. NO. Ayyyy, que mirada irónica y de satisfacción cada vez que se negaba.
Mi esposo intentó tranquilizarme.
Una hora después vimos otras caras en el Full. Una era Yanina. Me acerque, le expliqué a ella mi necesidad. Accedió inmediatamente. Agradecidos le preguntamos si ella era la jefa de Ángel. Y no....., eran COMPAÑEROS. No existía tal impedimento, solo había un empleado, un sólo empleado: cruel, resentido, mala persona. Más jodida su alma que la enfermedad que padece mi cuerpo. Un pobre tipo.
Afortunadamente, una excepción porque en mis 70 años, del ACA, sólo obtuve soluciones.
Éste "roto", no va a lograr desacredite mi calificación.
GRACIAS a los amorosos que cuidaron de aliviar nuestra preocupación!

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving them the highest rating because yesterday, Sunday, January 18, 2026, Yanina from Full, and her colleagues, including those from this morning, helped me with something related to my health.

Except for ANGEL, rude and insensitive!

Yesterday, Sunday, at 6:50 PM, when my husband and I arrived, we told them that I was a cancer patient, that I wasn't feeling well, and that the attendants had authorized us to spend the night at the rest stop so I could rest in our camper van and continue our trip early this morning. I needed them to keep a crucial and very expensive injection refrigerated because of my illness.
What did they tell us? NO. That only a supervisor could authorize that, and that unfortunately, she had just left. I reiterated how delicate the situation was, added that I've been a member of the ACA for years, and asked if I couldn't call the appropriate person. NO. Oh, the ironic and smug look she gave me every time she refused.

My husband tried to calm me down.

An hour later, we saw other faces at the Full. One was Yanina. I approached her and explained my situation. She agreed immediately. Grateful, we asked if she was Ángel's boss. And no… they were CO-WORKERS. There was no such impediment, just one employee, a single employee: cruel, resentful, a bad person. His soul is more messed up than the illness that afflicts my body. A pathetic fellow.

Fortunately, an exception, because in my 70 years at the ACA, I've only ever received solutions.
This "broken" guy isn't going to discredit my reputation.
THANK YOU to the kind people who took care of easing our worries!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25JMVoxcGlVbUpsUVhOcE1scHpUV3BsVEdSb04yYxAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para estirar las piernas. Arbolado, con bebederos y suficientes mesas/sillas (se puede consumir lo que uno trae sin problemas). Baños limpios. No entré al local así que no sé qué variedad de alimentos tiene.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stretch your legs. Shaded by trees, with drinking fountains and plenty of tables and chairs (you can bring your own food without any problem). Clean restrooms. I didn't go inside, so I don't know what kind of food they have.
